fields.name: Change_Type
fields.description: An indicator showing if the payment record is New, Added, Changed, or Unchanged in the current publication compared to the previous publication. NEW - To identify “new” records added from the end of the previous submission deadline until the current submission period deadline date ADDED - To identify records that were not eligible at the time of previous publication, which is eligible for current publication. CHANGED - To identify previously published records modified after the last publication. UNCHANGED - To identify previously published records that remain “unchanged” in current publication.
fields.title: change_type

fields.name: Physician_Profile_ID
fields.description: Open Payments system-generated unique identifier for physician profile with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_profile_id

fields.name: Physician_NPI
fields.description: National Provider Identifier is a unique identification number for covered recipient physician (and not the NPI of a group the physician belongs to).
fields.title: physician_npi

fields.name: Physician_First_Name
fields.description: First name of the physician (covered recipient) with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_first_name

fields.name: Physician_Middle_Name
fields.description: Middle name of the physician (covered recipient) with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_middle_name

fields.name: Physician_Last_Name
fields.description: Last name of the physician (covered recipient) with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_last_name

fields.name: Physician_Name_Suffix
fields.description: Name suffix of the physician (covered recipient) with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_name_suffix

fields.name: Recipient_Primary_Business_Street_Address_Line1
fields.description: The first line of the primary practice street address of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: recipient_primary_business_street_address_line1

fields.name: Recipient_Primary_Business_Street_Address_Line2
fields.description: The second line of the primary practice street address of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: recipient_primary_business_street_address_line2

fields.name: Recipient_City
fields.description: The primary practice city of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: recipient_city

fields.name: Recipient_State
fields.description: The primary practice/business state or territory abbreviation of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported, if the primary practice/business address is in the United States
fields.title: recipient_state

fields.name: Recipient_Zip_Code
fields.description: The 9-digit zip code for the primary practice location of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported, if the primary practice address is in the United States
fields.example: US Zip9 code format: 21244-3712 US Zip5 code format: 21244
fields.title: recipient_zip_code

fields.name: Recipient_Country
fields.description: The primary practice/business address country name of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: recipient_country

fields.name: Recipient_Province
fields.description: The primary practice/business province name of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported, if the primary practice/business address is outside the United States, and if applicable
fields.title: recipient_province

fields.name: Recipient_Postal_Code
fields.description: The international postal code for the primary practice/business location of the physician with the ownership or investment interest being reported, if the primary practice/business address is outside the United States
fields.title: recipient_postal_code

fields.name: Physician_Primary_Type
fields.description: The primary type of medicine practiced by the physician covered recipient with the ownership or investment interest being reported
fields.title: physician_primary_type

fields.name: Physician_Specialty
fields.description: Physician's single-specialty chosen from the standardized "provider taxonomy" code list
fields.title: physician_specialty

fields.name: Record_ID
fields.description: Open Payments system-generated unique identifier for the ownership payment record
fields.title: record_id

fields.name: Program_Year
fields.description: The year in which the ownership/investment interest occurred
fields.title: program_year

fields.name: Total_Amount_Invested_USDollars
fields.description: The dollar amount the physician or immediate family member has invested in the applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO during the PY, in US dollars
fields.title: total_amount_invested_usdollars

fields.name: Value_of_Interest
fields.description: The cumulative value of ownership or investment interest held by the physician or immediate family member in the applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO, in US dollars
fields.title: value_of_interest

fields.name: Terms_of_Interest
fields.description: Description of any applicable terms of the ownership or investment interest
fields.title: terms_of_interest

fields.name: Submitting_Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Name
fields.description: The textual proper name of either the submitting applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO
fields.title: submitting_applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_name

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_ID
fields.description: Open Payments ID of either the submitting applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_id

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_Name
fields.description: The textual proper name of either the submitting applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_name

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_State
fields.description: State name of either the submitting applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_state

fields.name: Applicable_Manufacturer_or_Applicable_GPO_Making_Payment_Country
fields.description: Country name of the submitting applicable manufacturer or applicable GPO
fields.title: applicable_manufacturer_or_applicable_gpo_making_payment_country

fields.name: Dispute_Status_for_Publication
fields.description: Indicates whether the ownership or investment interest is disputed by the physician
fields.title: dispute_status_for_publication

fields.name: Interest_Held_by_Physician_or_an_Immediate_Family_Member
fields.description: An indicator showing if the ownership or investment interest is held by the physician or by an immediate family member
fields.title: interest_held_by_physician_or_an_immediate_family_member

fields.name: Payment_Publication_Date
fields.description: The predefined date when the ownership or investment interest is scheduled to be published
fields.title: payment_publication_date
